---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for dotUniverse
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like.

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case for this feature. Who would benefit from it and how?

## Mockups / Examples

If applicable, add mockups, sketches, or examples to help explain your feature request.

## Component

Which part of dotUniverse does this feature relate to?

- [ ] Terminal commands
- [ ] Tools section
- [ ] VS Code extensions section
- [ ] Visual design / animations
- [ ] AMA section
- [ ] Growth challenge tracker
- [ ] Collaboration section
- [ ] Easter eggs
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Must have — I can't use the site effectively without it
- [ ] Should have — It would significantly improve my experience
- [ ] Could have — It would be a nice addition
- [ ] Won't have — It's a nice idea but not urgent

## Implementation Ideas

If you have ideas on how to implement this feature, please share them here.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.

## Roadmap Alignment

Does this feature align with the current roadmap?

- [ ] Yes — It fits the 1.x roadmap
- [ ] Not sure — Need maintainer input
- [ ] No — It's a new idea outside the roadmap

## Willingness to Contribute

Are you willing to help implement this feature?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] Yes, but I need guidance
- [ ] No, but I can help test
- [ ] No, I just want to suggest the idea

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] I have provided a clear description of the feature
- [ ] I have explained the use case and benefits
- [ ] I have considered alternative solutions
